title: Paraprofessional - Haitian Creole Language Focus
status: Part Time, 17.5 hours per weekMinimum Requirements:Communication proficiency MUST be at least conversational level for Haitian Creole language.Requires a minimum of an Associate's degreeor48 semester hours from an accredited college/universityorpassing results on an approved Paraprofessional Assessment.The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 1 of the SC Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkSC Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Paraprofessional (Language Focus).pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
